summary: iter170 Crowdfunding viral loop — full E2E (backend + frontend) verified. Backend test suite test_crowdfunding_recruit_iter170.py: 3/3 PASS (race-safe cap=3 under 10 concurrent visits via pg_advisory_xact_lock, notify_tier_awarded idempotent in-app + Resend email, run_reminder_pass idempotent). Admin endpoint POST /api/admin/crowdfunding/recruit-reminders/run: 401 for anon, 200 for admin returning expected schema {day_key, cycle_id, visited_no_vote{sent,errors,candidates}, voted_no_share{...}}. Frontend public route /crowdfunding/leaderboard: anon path renders cf-leaderboard-page, hero 'Top recruteurs Crowdfunding', 'Pas de cash, juste de la gloire', share btn, register CTA, cf-lb-rules with 5 bullets, cf-lb-cta-block visible. Logged-in (Bob) path: cf-lb-cta-block HIDDEN, hero register-cta HIDDEN, RecruiterProgressCard ('MA PROGRESSION / Programme Recruteur') rendered, pedagogy block still visible. Active cycle cycle_01573301c7e8.
critical_code_review_comments: CrowdfundingLeaderboardPage.useEffect: axios.get for /recruiter/me has no try/catch — if it 401s mid-session the leaderboard fetch result is lost (Promise.all rejects). Acceptable for now since /me is only requested when user is set; consider settling individually.
Pedagogy block ('cf-lb-rules') uses emoji bullets in <li> via plain text — accessibility could be improved with aria-labels for screen readers.
Public /crowdfunding/leaderboard correctly skips ProtectedRoute. Backend /api/crowdfunding/recruiter/leaderboard already returns {items:[], me:null} when anon — clean.
test_credentials: Bob bob@japap.com/Test1234! used via /api/auth/login with captcha bypass JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026; Admin admin@japap.com/JapapAdmin2024! for /api/admin/crowdfunding/recruit-reminders/run.
seed_data_creation: test_notify_tier_awarded inserts 3 dummy crowdfunding_recruit_credits (recruit_user_id LIKE 'test_notify_%') for Bob then cleans up; test_race_safe_cap inserts/deletes 3 crowdfunding_invite_visits with ip_hash='ip_race'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter170 fully validated. Public leaderboard route is anon-readable, tier notifications dispatch in-app + Resend email idempotently, advisory-lock anti-fraud caps to 3 visits even under 10-way concurrency, admin-only manual reminder trigger works and is idempotent across runs. No regressions detected.
